canonical_definition: A dataset of user reviews on Amazon products, used here for the task of personalized review generation, covering categories like Books, Movies & TV, and CDs & Vinyl, and preprocessed with splits from the DPL framework.
papers: Viability of Machine Translation for Healthcare in Low-Resourced Languages
VisBias: Measuring Explicit and Implicit Social Biases in Vision Language Models

relationships.paper: Viability of Machine Translation for Healthcare in Low-Resourced Languages
relationships.evidence: Building upon prior work, we focus on the representative task of item review generation for LLM personalization (Ni et al., 2019; Peng et al., 2024; Kumar et al., 2024; Au et al., 2025). Specifically, we adopt the Amazon Reviews 2023 dataset (Section 4.1)
